# Engineering Geology and Geomechanics

**Summary**: The application of geological and geotechnical engineering to engineering practice.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-tayyab|Tayyab, 2017]] used engineering-geology principles to assess the safety of building foundations.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2017-tayyab|Tayyab, 2017]] ['site investigation', 'geotechnical assessment']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2017-tayyab|Tayyab, 2017]] ['electrical-resistivity-tomography']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Concerns were raised about the integrity of the rock formation beneath the foundations of the proposed building. ([[2017-tayyab|Tayyab, 2017, p. 45]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2017-tayyab|Tayyab, 2017]] Identifying subsurface voids and poor rock quality in complex coastal environments.
